scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:mobile:prod && node scripts/verify-dist-for-capacitor.mjs && npx cap sync && node scripts/verify-dist-for-capacitor.mjs
scripts.cap:sync:android:prod: npm run build:mobile:prod && node scripts/verify-dist-for-capacitor.mjs && npx cap sync android && node scripts/verify-dist-for-capacitor.mjs
scripts.cap:sync:ios:prod: npm run build:mobile:prod && node scripts/verify-dist-for-capacitor.mjs && npx cap sync ios && node scripts/verify-dist-for-capacitor.mjs
scripts.ios:prep:mac: npm run cap:sync:ios:prod && cd ios/App && pod install
scripts.android:debug: npm run cap:sync:android:prod && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:debug:win: npm run cap:sync:android:prod && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.android:apk:release:win: node scripts/prepare-release-env.mjs && node scripts/verify-mobile-build-env.mjs && npm run cap:sync:android:prod && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease && cd .. && node scripts/copy-release-apk.mjs
scripts.android:apk:release:mac: node scripts/prepare-release-env.mjs && node scripts/verify-mobile-build-env.mjs && npm run cap:sync:android:prod && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease && cd .. && node scripts/copy-release-apk.mjs
